context: Evaluates whether the Discord client is correctly configured with all required GatewayIntentBits and Partials. The correct intent and partial selections are necessary for the bot to receive message content, DMs, and guild member data. Incorrect configuration would cause silent failures at runtime.

checklist.name: Client instantiation
checklist.description: A `new Client({ intents: [...], partials: [...] })` is created and exported as the default or named export.

checklist.name: DM partials
checklist.description: The partials array includes `Partials.Channel` and `Partials.Message` to support partial DM handling.

checklist.name: Singleton export
checklist.description: The client is exported as a module-level singleton (not re-created on each call), so all imports share the same instance.
